comment: Keep embeddings, lm_head, vision weights, norms, biases and small recurrent gates in float16.
Use Q4_K for the main model's attention paths and MLP output projections.
Use Q2_K for the main model's two largest MLP input projections.
Preserve source FP8 MTP matrices to maximize exact speculative-decoding acceptance; non-FP8 MTP tensors fall back to float16.
